paper.title: Demonstration of non-Markovian process characterisation and control on a quantum processor

implemented_equations.operational_table: p(sequence) measured for a basis of multi-time interventions
implemented_equations.markovian_baseline: single fitted channel M(lambda) repeated between controls

assumptions: The process tensor is represented as an operational table over a finite control alphabet.
The environment is a classical hidden two-state detuning with temporal persistence.
The benchmark measures +X survival after control sequences.
This is a synthetic memory/control benchmark, not a real-device reconstruction.
